code.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email address is already registered.
code.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account locked for 15 minutes due to too many failed login attempts.
code.INVALID_TOKEN: This link is invalid or has already been used.
code.TOKEN_EXPIRED: This link has expired. Please request a new one.
code.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action.
code.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
code.BAD_REQUEST: The request could not be processed. Please check your input.
code.VALIDATION_ERROR: Some fields contain invalid values. Please review and try again.
code.CONFLICT: This action conflicts with an existing record.
code.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
code.PLAN_REQUIRED: This feature requires a Premium subscription.
code.NETWORK_ERROR: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.
code.OAUTH_FAILED: Sign in with Google failed. Please try again.
code.GOOGLE_ALREADY_LINKED: This Google account is already connected to another user.
code.LINK_FAILED: Failed to connect Google account. Please try again.
code.LINK_EXPIRED: The connection request has expired. Please try again.
code.ORDER_ACCESS_DENIED: You do not have access to this order.
code.SESSION_MISMATCH: Your session does not match this order.
code.SESSION_INVALID: Your session is invalid or has expired. Please scan the QR code again.
code.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please scan the QR code again.
code.SESSION_REQUIRED: A valid session is required to continue.
code.ORDER_FINALIZED: This order is already completed or cancelled.
code.ORDER_PAID_CANNOT_CANCEL: This order has been paid — close the table instead of cancelling.
code.ORDER_NOT_PAYABLE: This order cannot be paid in its current status.
code.ORDER_ITEMS_BEING_PREPARED: Cannot cancel — some items are already being prepared.
code.ITEM_NOT_EDITABLE: This item can only be modified before kitchen preparation starts.
code.CANCEL_REASON_TOO_SHORT: Cancellation reason must be at least 10 characters.
code.TABLE_ORDER_LOCKED: Another guest has already placed an order for this table. You can view the current order.
code.ACTIVE_ORDER_EXISTS: You already have an active order. Only one order is allowed at a time.
code.ACTIVE_CALL_EXISTS: There is already an active waiter call for this table.
code.PAYMENT_NOT_CONFIGURED: Online payments are not configured for this restaurant.
code.PAYMENT_ALREADY_MADE: Payment has already been processed for this order.
code.MENU_CHANGED: The menu has changed since your cart was loaded. Please review your order.
code.STATUS_ROLLBACK_TOO_FAR: Status can only be reverted one step at a time.
code.ROLLBACK_ALREADY_USED: This group has already been rolled back once — advance it first.
code.PRECEDING_GROUP_NOT_READY: A preceding serving group has not yet reached this status.
code.STATUS_CANNOT_DECREASE: Dish status can only be moved forward.
code.NO_RESTAURANT_LINKED: No restaurant is associated with your account.
code.WRONG_RESTAURANT: You do not have access to this restaurant.
code.FILE_ERROR: File upload failed. Please try again.
code.DUPLICATE_KEY: A record with this value already exists.
code.PASSWORD_ALREADY_SET: Your account already has a password. Use Change Password instead.

generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
